question: Someone in your family is going on a vacation and you have agreed to take care of his or her responsibilities at home. Call your relative and ask three or four questions to get all the information you need.
answer: Hey, it's me. I heard you're going on vacation soon, so I just wanted to make sure I know everything before you leave. First, when exactly are you leaving, and when will you be back? How many days will you be away? Is there a specific time you need me to come by each day? About your house, do you want me to water your plants every day, or just a few times a week? Are there any special instructions for certain plants, or is it all the same? Do you have a pet that I need to feed? How often should I feed it, and what kind of food do I use? Where do you keep the pet food and supplies? Also, should I collect your mail or take out the trash while you’re gone? Where do you usually keep your house key, or should I pick it up before you leave? Is there anything special I need to prepare or watch out for? Let me know if there’s anything else. I’ll make sure everything’s fine. See you soon!

question: You need to rent a car for about a week. Call the rental agency and ask three or four questions to get all the information you need.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about renting a car for about a week. First, what kinds of cars do you have available right now? Do you have any small cars or maybe something good for a longer trip? Is there a car you would recommend if I'm using it for a week? Also, how much does it cost to rent a car for a week? Does that price include insurance, or is there an extra charge for that? Are there any other fees I should know about, like for extra drivers or mileage? Next, where do I pick up the car? Can you tell me the exact address or location of your rental office? And when I return the car, do I bring it back to the same place, or is there another drop-off spot? Lastly, what do I need to bring when I come in? Do I just need my driver's license and ID, or is there anything else I should prepare? Thanks for your help!

question: You are visiting New York on vacation. You go to a car rental agency to rent a car. Imagine you are speaking to a rental car agent and ask three or four questions about renting a car for a week.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about renting a car for a week while I'm visiting New York. What kinds of cars do you have right now? Do you have any small cars or maybe something that's easy to drive in the city? Are there any SUVs or bigger cars if I have a lot of luggage? How much does it cost to rent a car for a week? Does the price include insurance, or do I need to pay extra for that? Are there any extra fees I should know about, like for gas or cleaning? What are your pickup and return locations? Can I pick up the car downtown and return it at the airport? Do I need to let you know in advance if I want to return it somewhere else? What documents do I need to bring to rent a car? Is my passport and driver's license enough, or do you need anything else? Is there anything I should prepare before I come in? Thank you for your help!

question: You are trying to find a brand new store that just opened but you are lost. You see a restaurant that is open. Go into the restaurant and ask three or four questions to find out how to get to the store.
answer: Hi, excuse me. I'm trying to find a brand new store that just opened nearby, but I'm a bit lost. Do you know where the new store is? Is it close to this restaurant, or do I need to walk far? If you know, can you tell me exactly how to get there from here? Should I go straight down this street, or do I need to turn at some point? About how long does it usually take to walk there? Is there a bus I can take, or is walking better? Also, are there any big landmarks or signs I should watch for so I don't miss it? Is the store near a subway station, or maybe next to another famous shop? Is it easy to spot from the street, or is it kind of hidden? Is there anything I need to bring or prepare before I go? Thank you so much for your help. I really appreciate it!

question: A friend has invited you for dinner tomorrow night at a restaurant that you've never been to. Call your friend and leave a voice mail message asking three or four questions about the restaurant.
answer: Hey! I got your message about dinner tomorrow, and I’m really excited. I’ve never been to that restaurant, so I wanted to ask you a few things. What’s the name of the place, and where is it exactly? Is it close to a subway station, or should I take a bus or taxi? How long does it usually take to get there from my place? What time are we meeting, and do you want me to come a bit early or is there a specific time we should arrive? What kind of food do they have? Do they serve anything special, or is there a dish you recommend? Is it expensive, or is it pretty reasonable? Should I dress up, or is it okay to wear something casual? Do they have parking nearby if I decide to drive? Do I need to bring anything, or just myself? Let me know when you can. See you soon!

question: You would like to go to a new restaurant that has opened recently. Call the restaurant and ask three or four questions to see if you want to go to that restaurant.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about your new restaurant because I'm thinking about visiting soon. Can you tell me what kind of food you serve? Do you have any special dishes or chef's recommendations? Are there vegetarian or vegan options on your menu? I'm also curious about the prices—how much do your main dishes usually cost? Do you offer any set menus or lunch specials? What about your business hours? Are you open every day, and do you have different hours on weekends? Do I need to make a reservation for dinner, or can I just walk in? Lastly, where exactly is your restaurant located? Is there parking available nearby, or do you have a parking lot? Is there anything I should bring or prepare before I come? Thank you for your help!

question: Your friend has a family member who has just opened up a restaurant. Ask three or four questions to learn more about this new restaurant to decide whether you want to order food from it.
answer: Hey! I heard your family just opened a new restaurant, and I'm really curious about it. What kind of food do they serve, and do they have any special dishes that people are talking about? Is the menu pretty big, or do they focus on just a few things? Are the prices pretty reasonable, or is it more of a special occasion place? Do they offer any lunch specials or discounts? Can you tell me if they do delivery, or is it only for dine-in and takeout? How long does it usually take for the food to be ready if I order? Where exactly is the restaurant located, and is there parking nearby? Is it easy to get there by subway or bus? What are their opening hours, and do they close early on weekends? Do you have a favorite dish you think I should try first? Do you have time this weekend? Let's go check it out together. See you!

question: I'd like to know about a great sale happening at one of your favorite stores. Call your friend and ask three or four questions to find out as much as you can about the sale.
answer: Hey! I heard there’s a big sale at your favorite store, so I wanted to ask you a few things about it. What kind of sale is going on right now? Are all the products on sale, or just certain brands? Do you know if they have any special deals, like buy one get one free or extra discounts on some items? How much are the discounts, usually? Is it a fixed percentage off, or does it depend on the item? When does the sale start and end? Is it still happening this weekend, or is there a best time to visit for the biggest deals? Where is the store exactly? Is it close to a subway station or easy to get to by bus? What are their opening and closing hours these days? Did you buy anything cool there recently, or do you think it’s really worth checking out? Do you have time this weekend? Let’s go together and maybe grab some food after. See you!

question: There is a newly opened store. Call your friend who knows about the new store and ask some questions about the store to get some information.
answer: Hey! I heard there’s a new store that just opened, and you already checked it out, right? I want to know more about it. What kind of things do they sell? Is it mostly clothes, or do they have other stuff too? Do they have any special brands or unique items? Are the products good quality? How are the prices there? Is it expensive, or can you find some good deals? Do they have any discounts or opening sales going on right now? Where exactly is the store located? Is it close to a subway station or a bus stop? Is there parking nearby? What time do they usually open and close? Do they stay open late on weekends? Have you been there yourself? Did you like it? Do you have time this weekend? Let’s go check it out together. See you soon!

question: You see a sign at your favorite store that says that they are having a big sale. Call the store and ask three or four questions about that special sale.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about the big sale I saw advertised at your store. Could you tell me what kinds of items are on sale right now? Are all the products discounted or just some special categories? Do you have any popular brands included in the sale? Also, how big are the discounts? Is there a set percentage off, or does it depend on the item? Are there any buy-one-get-one-free deals or special offers? Can you tell me how long the sale will last? Does it end this weekend, or will it continue into next week? What are your store hours during the sale? Do you open earlier or close later because of the event? Where exactly is your store located? Could you give me the address, and is there parking available nearby? Is there anything I should bring or prepare before I visit? Thank you for your help!

question: You see a sign at your favorite store that says that they are having a big sale. Go to the store and ask three or four questions to get as much information as possible about the sale.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I saw your big sale sign and I want to know more about it.  Can you tell me what kinds of items are on sale right now? Are all the brands included, or just some of them? Do you have any special deals on electronics or clothes?  Also, how big is the discount? Is it a fixed percent off, or does it depend on the item? Are there any buy-one-get-one-free offers?  I’m wondering about the sale period too. When does it start and end? Is it only for this weekend, or will it last longer?  Where in the store can I find the sale items? Are they in a special section, or just mixed in? Can I use my points or coupons with the sale prices? Is there a limit to how many sale items I can buy?  Do I need to bring anything special to get the discount? Thanks for your help!

question: You have been writing a report about the technology industry. Your friend knows a lot about this industry. Call her and ask three or four questions to learn more about this industry for your report.
answer: Hey! It's me. I'm working on a report about the technology industry, and I know you know a lot about it, so I wanted to ask you a few things. First, what are the main areas in tech that are getting the most attention right now? Are people more interested in AI, smartphones, or maybe something else? Which companies are really leading these trends, and do you know why they're so popular? Also, how much does it usually cost to get started with some of this new technology? Are there any affordable options for students like me? Another thing—how has the industry changed over the past few years? Have you noticed any big shifts, maybe with remote work or new gadgets? Where do you usually go for the latest news—are there any websites or podcasts you recommend? Do you have time this weekend? Let's meet up and talk about it more. See you!

question: You need to buy a train ticket to go visit your friend this weekend. Go to the ticket counter at the train station and ask three or four questions to get information you need to make a reservation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I want to get a train ticket to visit my friend this weekend. Can I ask a few things? First, what kinds of trains are running to that city? Do you have fast trains, or just regular ones? Are there any special seats or classes I can choose from? Next, what times are the trains leaving on Saturday and Sunday? Is there an early morning train, or maybe something in the afternoon? How late do the trains run at night? Also, how much do the tickets usually cost? Is there a student or weekend discount? What about cheaper seats if I want to save some money? And where exactly does the train leave from? Which platform should I go to? Do I need to get there early? Is there anything special I need to bring when I pick up my ticket? Thanks a lot for your help!

question: You want to take a trip within your own country. Call the travel agent and ask three or four questions to find out what you need.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about taking a trip within my country. I'm looking for some good options, so could you tell me what kinds of trips you offer? Are there any popular destinations or special packages right now? Do you have trips that are good for a short weekend getaway? Also, I want to know about the prices. How much does each package cost? Is the hotel included in the price, or do I need to pay extra for anything? What about meals or transportation—are those covered as well? I'm also wondering about the timing. When are the next available dates for these trips? Can I go this weekend, or do I need to book far in advance? How long does each trip usually last? Finally, is there anything I need to prepare before I go? Do I need to bring anything special, or fill out any forms? Thank you for your help!

question: You are planning a vacation with a friend. Call the travel agency and describe the kind of vacation you and your friend are planning. Then, ask three or four questions to find out what you need to know to complete the plans for this vacation.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about planning a relaxing vacation by the beach for me and my friend. Do you have any good destinations for two people who just want to relax? Are there any special packages for couples or friends? What kinds of activities are included in those packages? Does the package cover both the hotel and the flight, or do we have to book them separately? Are meals or any tours included, too? How much does the whole trip usually cost for two people? Are there any extra charges or hidden fees we should know about? When is the best time to go for nice weather? Do you have any openings next month, or is it already fully booked? How many days does the package last, and can we change the dates if we need to? Is there anything important we need to bring or prepare before the trip? Do we have to pay everything in advance, or is there a deposit? Thanks a lot for your help!

question: You need to make a travel arrangement for a trip you want to take next month. Call the travel agency and ask three or four questions to get the information that you need to plan your trip.
answer: Hello, I'm calling to ask about planning a trip for next month. I'm looking for some recommendations, so could you tell me what kinds of destinations are popular right now? Do you have any special packages that are good for solo travelers, or maybe for small groups? Are there any trips that include outdoor activities or sightseeing? Also, I'm wondering about the price. How much do the different packages cost? Is there a big difference between the cheapest and the most expensive one? What exactly is included in the price, like meals or tickets? Next, I want to know about the dates. When are the trips available next month? Can I leave around the middle of the month, or maybe at the end? How long does each trip usually last? And where do most of the trips leave from? Do I need to come to your office, or can I meet the group somewhere else? Is there anything I need to prepare before the trip, like documents or special gear? Thank you so much for your help!

question: You are planning to visit a friend who is living in a different country. Ask your friend three or four questions about the geography of his or her country.
answer: Hey! I heard you’re living in a totally different country now, and I’m really excited to visit soon. I want to get ready, so can I ask you a few things?  First, what’s the weather like these days? Is it usually sunny or rainy? Should I bring a jacket, or is it pretty warm?  Also, are there any famous mountains or big rivers near your city? Is there a beach close by, or do people go hiking a lot?  What’s the most beautiful place around you that I really shouldn’t miss?  I’m also curious about transportation—do most people use buses or trains, or do you think I should rent a car to get around? Is it easy to walk to places, or are things pretty far apart?  Last thing, do you have any tips about the city layout, like where the main downtown is or if there are cool neighborhoods to check out?  Do you have time this weekend? Let’s go. See you!

question: Your friend has just returned from a vacation to the United States. Ask your friend three or four questions to find out everything you can about his or her trip.
answer: Hey! I heard you just got back from your trip to the United States. I really want to hear all about it. Which cities did you visit, and did you go to any famous places? Did you travel around by car or did you use public transport? How did you decide where to go each day? What kinds of things did you do there—did you try anything new or exciting? Was there anything that surprised you about the places you visited? How was the food? Did you try any American dishes or go to any restaurants you liked? Was it easy to find food you enjoyed? How much did you end up spending on food and activities? Was it more expensive than you expected? How long did you stay in each place, and was the weather nice? By the way, do you have time this weekend? Let’s meet up—I want to hear all your stories and see your photos. See you soon!

question: I want to visit your country. You want to help me, but you need more information. Ask me three of four questions to learn more about me and my trip.
answer: Hey! I heard you want to visit my country, and I really want to help you plan your trip.  Can I ask when you’re thinking of coming here? How many days are you planning to stay, and is it your first time visiting? Are you traveling alone or with friends or family?  What kind of things do you want to do while you’re here—are you more into nature, or do you want to check out the city life? Are you interested in any special events or festivals?  What kind of food do you like? Are you open to trying local dishes, or do you have any food allergies I should know about?  What’s your budget for the trip—do you want to stay in hotels, or are you looking for something more affordable like guesthouses? Are you hoping to visit big cities, or do you want to see smaller towns and the countryside? Is there anything you really want to experience while you’re here?  Let me know, and I’ll help you make a plan. Do you have time this weekend to talk more? Let’s meet up and go over your ideas. See you!

question: You have arrived at the airport, but your flight has been delayed for 2 hours. Go to the counter and ask the person there three or four questions about the delay.
answer: Hi, excuse me. I'm calling because I just found out my flight is delayed for two hours, and I want to ask a few things about it. Can you tell me exactly why the flight is delayed? Is it because of weather, or is there some other reason? Do you know how long the delay might last? Is there a chance it could be delayed even more? Could you tell me the new estimated departure time? Will the boarding gate stay the same, or do I need to check for changes? Also, do I need to do anything special while I wait? Is it okay if I leave the gate area for a bit and come back later? Is there somewhere comfortable to wait, like a lounge or a quiet area? Are you offering any meal vouchers or compensation because of this delay? I also have a connecting flight—will this delay affect my next flight, or will someone help me if I miss it? Is there anything else I should prepare for while I wait? Thank you for your help.

question: You are having a group of friends over to watch a movie. Ask your friends four to five questions about the kind of movie you should watch together.
answer: Hey! I heard everyone is coming over for movie night, so I want to make sure we pick something everyone likes. What kind of movie do you guys feel like watching? Do you want something funny, or are you more in the mood for action or maybe a horror movie? Is there a specific movie you’ve been wanting to see lately, or maybe something new that just came out? Have any of you already seen the latest releases, or should we avoid those? How do you feel about watching a classic instead? Also, do you want something light and easy to watch, or are you up for something a bit more serious or dramatic? How long should the movie be—are you okay with a long movie, or do you want something shorter? Do you have any snack requests, or should I just grab the usual popcorn and drinks? Do you have time this weekend? Let’s go. See you!

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You just got your bank card, but there is problem and you can't use it. Call the bank, explain the situation, and offer some suggestions to get a new card.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I just got my new bank card from your bank last week, but when I tried to use it for the first time yesterday, it didn’t work at all. I put it in the ATM and tried to pay at a store, but both times, the machine said there was an error and wouldn’t accept my card. Honestly, I don’t really know what to do right now. Can you cancel this card and send me a new one to my address? If that’s not possible, is it okay if I visit your branch and get a replacement card there? Or maybe, is it possible to fix this problem over the phone if I give you my ID and account number? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have left your new bank card at the restaurant where you had dinner. Call the restaurant and explain what happened. Describe the card and tell them how to get the card back to you.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. Last night, I had dinner at your restaurant, and after I paid, I accidentally left my new bank card on the table. It's a blue card with my name on it, and I think it was near table five. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you please check if the card is still there? If you find it, is it possible to keep it safe at the front desk so I can come by and pick it up? Or, if that's not possible, could you mail it to my home address? If you need my information, I can give it to you. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You parked the bike that you borrowed outside the shopping mall, but the bike was run over by a truck. Call your friend and explain the situation. Give two or three alternatives to your friend.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I borrowed your bike a couple of days ago and parked it outside the shopping mall. But when I came back, I saw that a truck had run over it, and the bike was totally smashed. Honestly, I feel really bad and I don't really know what to do. Can I take it to a repair shop and pay for all the repairs? If that's not possible, can I buy you the same bike as a replacement? Or, if you prefer, I can just send you the money for a new one right away. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 차 고장으로 비즈니스 미팅에 못 감
question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Because of the car trouble, you will miss an important business meeting. Call your client and explain the situation and offer some alternative solutions.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. On my way to our business meeting this morning, my car suddenly broke down in the middle of the road. I tried to restart it, but it just wouldn't work, so I had to call for a tow truck. Because of this, I won't be able to make it to our meeting on time, and honestly, I feel pretty bad about it. I don't really know what to do right now. Can we reschedule the meeting for later today, maybe in an hour or two? If that's not possible, is it okay if we do the meeting online, like over Zoom or a phone call? Or if you prefer, we could meet on another day this week when it's convenient for you. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 집 수도관 터져서 모임에 못 감
question: On the day of the celebration, a water pipe breaks in your home and you have to stay there until it is repaired. Call your friend, explain what has happened, and propose some alternative plans to see your friend at another time.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. This morning, a water pipe broke in my house and water went everywhere. I had to call a repair person, and now I need to stay home until it's fixed. Honestly, I don't really know what to do. Can we maybe meet next weekend instead? If not, is it possible for me to come over later tonight after everything is fixed? Or, if you prefer, we could just have a small dinner together some other day—I'll treat you. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The clothes you have ordered have arrived, but one of the shirts has a problem. Call the clothing store and explain the problem. Give two to three alternatives to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I ordered some clothes from your store, and they arrived yesterday. But when I opened the package, I saw that one of the shirts had a really big stain on the front. Also, the collar looked kind of damaged, so honestly, I can't wear it at all. I'm not really sure what to do about this. Can you send me a new shirt to replace the damaged one? If that's not possible, is it possible to get a full refund for the shirt? Or maybe I can return it to your store and pick out something else instead. I have my receipt ready, and I can send you a picture if you need proof. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The clothes you have ordered have arrived, but one of the shirts is NOT the correct one. Call the clothing store and explain the problem. Make two to three suggestions as to how and when you can get the correct shirt.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. My order arrived today, but one of the shirts is not the one I ordered. I wanted a blue shirt in medium, but you sent me a red one in large, so I think there was a mix-up. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you send me the correct blue medium shirt as soon as possible? If that's possible, can I return the wrong one to you by mail? Or, if it's easier, can I come to your store and exchange it in person? Do you have any better idea? Thank you so much for your help.

question: There is a problem I need you to act it out. You placed an order at the coffee shop, but they gave you the wrong drink. Speak to the staff, explain the issue, and suggest two or three ways to resolve it.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I ordered a hot latte a few minutes ago, but I got an iced americano instead. Honestly, I was really surprised because I was looking forward to a hot drink, and this is totally different from what I wanted. I don't really know what to do. Can you please make the hot latte I ordered? If that's not possible, can I get a refund for my order? Or, is it okay if I switch to a different drink from the menu? I still have my receipt with me, so I can show it to you if needed. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: A new food store has opened in your neighborhood. You visited that store and purchased some items. However, when you got home, you found out that the clerk left out some items from your food cart. Call the store, explain the situation and make suggestions to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I visited your new store today and bought some food, but when I got home and checked my bags, I realized that a couple of items were missing. I paid for some fruit and milk, but those things weren't in my bags, so I guess the clerk forgot to put them in. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you maybe keep the missing items at the store for me so I can pick them up later today or tomorrow? If that's not possible, is it okay to send them to my house? Or, if neither works, can I get a refund for the missing items? I have the receipt with me. Do you have any better solution? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve. When you get the piece of furniture at home, you don't like the way it looks. Call the store, explain why you are not satisfied, and propose some solutions to resolve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I ordered a chair from your store, and it was delivered to my house yesterday. But honestly, when I put it together, it looked really different from what I saw in the store. The color was way darker than I expected, and now it doesn't go with my room at all. I'm not really sure what to do in this situation. Can you exchange it for the same chair but in a lighter color? If that's not possible, is it okay if I just get a refund instead? Or maybe I could return this one and choose a different chair that fits my room better. I still have the box and the receipt with me. Do you have any other options that could help? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve. When you get your new furniture at your home, you realize that there is a serious problem. Call the store and explain the problem in detail. Then make some suggestions as to how you can resolve the problem as quickly as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. My new table was delivered this morning, but when I opened the box, I saw that one of the legs was cracked and the top had a deep scratch. Honestly, it looked like it was already damaged before it got here, and I was really surprised. I don't really know what to do. Can you send someone to repair the table as soon as possible? If that's not possible, is it okay to exchange it for a new one? Or, if neither of those work, can I get a full refund? I really hope we can solve this quickly. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: After purchasing a food item at the store, you have discovered that something is wrong with the item. Call the store and explain the problem in detail and propose a solution.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. Yesterday, I bought some food at your store, and when I got home and opened it, I noticed something was wrong. The smell was really off, and I saw that the expiration date had already passed, so I was pretty surprised. I don't really know what to do. Can you exchange it for a fresh one? If that's not possible, is it possible to get a refund? Or, if you prefer, I can bring the item and the receipt back to the store so you can check it yourself. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you visit the gym for the first time, it is not at all what you expected. Call the gym manager and describe your experience in detail. And then, make an arrangement to get a full refund for your money.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I signed up for your gym and visited for the first time yesterday, but it really wasn't what I expected. The gym was way smaller than the pictures online, several machines weren't working, and honestly, it was super crowded and not very clean. I felt pretty disappointed and kind of uncomfortable, since I was hoping for a nice place to work out. I don't really know what to do. Since I just joined, can I get a full refund for my membership? If that's not possible, is it okay if I freeze my membership for now? Or maybe I could switch to another branch if that's an option. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 아파서 헬스 트레이너 미팅 못 감
question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You arranged to meet trainers and nutritionists at the gym, but on the morning that you were supposed to meet them, you wake up and feel ill. Call the gym, explain the situation and offer two or three possible alternatives.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to meet with the trainers and nutritionists at your gym this morning, but I woke up feeling really sick. I had a bad headache and a fever, so I couldn't get out of bed. Honestly, I don't really know what to do. Is it possible to reschedule the meeting for another day this week? If that doesn't work, can we maybe do a short phone call or video chat instead, just to talk about the basics? Or, if it's easier, I can come in next week when I'm feeling better. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 등산 중 휴대폰 분실, 행인에게 도움 요청
question: There is a problem I need you to act it out. During the hike, you realize that you've lost your phone and need assistance. Approach a passerby on the trail, explain your situation, and ask for their help.
answer: Hi, excuse me, I'm calling out because I have a problem. I was hiking up this trail earlier, and at some point, I lost my phone. I think it slipped out of my pocket while I was walking, and now I can't find it anywhere. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Could you please call my number with your phone, so I can try to hear it ring nearby? If that doesn't work, is it possible for you to show me where the nearest ranger station or help center is? Or, if you're going back down the trail, could I walk with you so we can ask someone for help together? Do you have any better idea that could help me out? Thank you so much for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On your way to your friend's house, your car breaks down. You realize you will be very late. Call your friend and explain what happened in detail. Then, make some suggestions and tell them how and when you will get to the holiday meal.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. On my way to your house, my car broke down. It suddenly made a strange noise and then just stopped in the middle of the road. I already called a tow truck, but honestly, I think it's going to take some time. I'm not really sure what to do right now. Can you start the holiday meal without me, and I'll come as soon as I can? If that's not possible, maybe I can get a taxi and try to be there in about an hour. Or if it's too late, do you want to reschedule and meet up next week instead? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you get to your hotel room, it is very small and not clean at all. Call the front desk and describe what you have found in detail. Then make some suggestions as to how you can resolve the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling from room 305 because I have a problem. I just checked in, but honestly, the room is much smaller than I expected and it's not clean at all. The bed was messy, the bathroom was dirty, and there was a weird smell when I walked in. It's really not what I booked, and I feel pretty uncomfortable staying here. I don't really know what to do. Can you move me to a different, cleaner room? If that's not possible, can you send someone to clean this room right away? Or, if those options don't work, is it possible for me to get a refund and check out? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 갑작스러운 문제로 상사와 출장 못 감
question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are supposed to travel outside of your country on a business trip with your boss. But due to a sudden problem, you are unable to go. Call your boss and explain the situation in detail. And then, offer two or three possible solutions, so your company would not lose this business opportunity.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  We were supposed to go on the business trip together this week, but something unexpected happened at home. My family member got sick suddenly, so I had to stay and take care of them. Honestly, I'm really sorry about this,  and I don't really know what to do.  Can we maybe send another coworker instead of me, so the meetings still happen? If that's not possible, could I join all the meetings online by video call? Or, if you think it's better, is it possible to delay the trip by a week?  Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You've learned that there are no rooms available in this hotel. Call your travel companions to let them know about the situation. Leave a message to describe the situation and propose alternative solutions to the problem.
answer: Hey, it's me. I'm calling because I have a problem. I just got to the hotel we booked, but they said there are no rooms left for us. They told me our reservation didn’t go through, so now there’s nothing available. Honestly, I don’t really know what to do right now. Can you check if there’s another hotel close by where we could stay tonight? If that’s not possible, should I ask the staff here if they can help us find rooms at another branch? Or, if nothing works, maybe we could just split up and stay wherever there’s space for tonight. Do you have any better idea? Please let me know what you think. Thanks for understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have left your bag in the taxi that brought you back to the hotel. Call the taxi company and explain what happened, describe your bag, and tell them how to get the bag back to you.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. Earlier today, I took one of your taxis back to my hotel, but after I got out, I realized I left my bag in the back seat. It's a black backpack with a laptop and some important papers inside. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you check with the driver to see if my bag is still in the car? If you find it, is it possible for the driver to bring it to my hotel near the station? If that's not possible, can I come to your office and pick it up myself? Or maybe you could send it to me another way. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you arrive on your vacation, you realize that you have brought the wrong clothes for the weather. Call a clothing store and explain what happened in detail. And then, make some arrangements to purchase some new clothes as soon as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  I came here for my vacation, but I brought the wrong clothes for the weather. I honestly thought it would be warm, so I only packed light summer things, but when I arrived, it was much colder and rainy than I expected.  Now, I really need to get some warmer clothes quickly, but I'm not sure what I should do.  Do you have any jackets, sweaters, or long pants in stock that I could buy today? If not, is it possible for me to order them online and have them delivered to my hotel as soon as possible? Or, maybe you could suggest another way for me to get warm clothes fast?  Do you have any better ideas? Thank you so much for your help and understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you tried to visit the site that your friend has recommended, nothing comes up. Then, make suggestions as to how you might want to see the site as soon as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I tried to visit the website you recommended, but nothing came up. The screen just stayed blank, and I even tried on a couple of different browsers, but it still didn't work. Honestly, I'm not sure if I wrote the address wrong or if the site is just down right now. I don't really know what to do. Can you send me the exact link again, maybe by text? If that doesn't work, is it possible for you to let me know if there's another way to see the same content, like a different website or app? Or, if nothing works, could you take some screenshots and send them to me for now? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 브라우저 문제로 로그인 안 됨, 헬프데스크
question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have tried to log on to that website, but there is something wrong with your web browser. Call the internet help desk and ask for help. Explain why you need to get help as soon as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem with my web browser. Yesterday, I tried to log on to a website, but the page kept freezing and every time I clicked the login button, I got an error message. I really needed to get on that site because I had some important work to finish by today, so honestly, I'm pretty worried. I don't really know what to do right now. Can you walk me through some steps to fix my browser over the phone? If that's not possible, is there another browser you think I should try instead? Or, is it possible for someone from your team to connect to my computer and fix it for me? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Due to an emergency, you will not be able to attend your job interview. Call the company and leave a message explaining the situation. Then, offer two or three alternate plans so that you do not lose this opportunity.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I had a job interview scheduled for today, but something happened this morning. My family member suddenly got hurt, so I had to take them to the hospital right away. Because of this, I just can't make it to the interview today, and honestly, I don't really know what to do. I really want this job, so could we maybe reschedule the interview for another day this week? If that's not possible, is it okay to do the interview online, like with a video call? Or, if it works better, I can come in early tomorrow morning instead. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On the day of your appointment, you realize that you will not be able to make it. Call the doctor's office and explain your situation in detail. Then, offer some suggestions as to when you can reschedule the appointment.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to come in for my doctor's appointment today, but something happened at work. My boss told me this morning that I have to join an urgent meeting, so I can't leave the office. Honestly, I'm not sure what to do right now. Is it possible to reschedule my appointment for later this week, maybe on Thursday or Friday? If those days are already booked, can I come in next Monday instead? Or, if that's not possible, can you put me on a waiting list and let me know if someone cancels? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On the day you are supposed to visit your friend, you wake up with a terrible toothache. Call your friend and explain the problem in detail. Then make some arrangements to reschedule your visit to another day.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to come visit you today, but I woke up this morning with a really bad toothache. Honestly, it hurt so much that I couldn’t even eat breakfast, so I had to make an appointment with the dentist for this afternoon. I’m really sorry about this sudden change. I don’t really know what to do. Can we maybe meet next weekend instead? If that doesn’t work for you, is it possible for me to visit another day this week, after I feel better? Or, if you want, we can just have a quick video call today so we can still catch up. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are unable to meet your friend at the time and place that was agreed upon. Call your friend and give three or four alternatives to address the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. We agreed to meet at a certain time and place, but honestly, something unexpected happened and I just couldn't make it there as planned. I feel pretty bad about this, and I don't really know what to do. Can we maybe meet an hour later instead? Or, if that's not possible, is it okay if we meet somewhere that's closer for both of us? If today just doesn't work, can we meet tomorrow instead? Or, if it's easier, would you like to come over to my place? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you and your friend arrive at the theater, you discover that you have been sold the wrong tickets. Explain the situation to the ticket seller in the booth and offer two or three alternatives to resolve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem with my tickets. My friend and I arrived at the theater a few minutes ago, but when we checked our tickets, we saw that they were for the wrong movie and time. We actually asked for the new action movie at seven, but these tickets are for a different film at nine. Honestly, I'm not really sure what to do right now. Can you change these tickets to the right movie at seven for us? If that's not possible, is it okay to get tickets for the next showing of the action movie? Or, if none of those work, can I get a refund for both tickets? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are at the movies with your friend, but the movie is boring and you want to leave. Explain the problem to your friend and come up with two to three alternatives.
answer: Hey, can I talk to you for a second? I'm calling because I have a problem. So, we came to watch this movie together, but honestly, it's just not interesting at all. I was really looking forward to it, but after about half an hour, I realized it's pretty boring. I kept checking my phone, and I noticed you looked kind of bored, too. I don't really know what to do right now. Can we just leave and grab a coffee somewhere instead? If not, is it possible to go get dinner nearby and chat for a while? Or, if you still want to watch a movie, can we switch to a different one in the theater? Do you have any better option? Thank you for understanding.

question: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You borrowed your friend's MP3 player and broke it. Call your friend, explain in detail how the MP3 player broke and the current condition of the MP3 player. Then, offer two or three options to get your friend a working MP3 player as soon as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I borrowed your MP3 player a couple of days ago, and honestly, something bad happened. While I was jogging, the MP3 player slipped out of my pocket and hit the ground really hard. The screen got completely cracked, and now it won't turn on at all. I'm really sorry about this. I don't really know what to do. Can I take it to a repair shop and see if they can fix it for you? If that's not possible, can I buy you the same model as a replacement? Or, if you prefer, I could just send you the money right away so you can get a new one yourself. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

topic: 상사가 야근 시켜 영양사 미팅 못 감
question: You have an appointment to meet with a nutritionist who can help you make your diet healthier. However, on the day of the meeting, your boss asks you to work late. Call the nutritionist, explain the situation, and offer some alternatives.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to meet you today for my nutrition appointment, but my boss just told me I have to stay late at work. There’s a big project that came up, and honestly, I really can’t leave the office early. I’m sorry for letting you know so late. I don’t really know what to do. Can we reschedule our meeting for another day this week, maybe Thursday or Friday? If you’re not free then, is it possible to set up a time next week? Or, if you have a few minutes, maybe we could do a quick phone call today instead of meeting in person. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You just found out the park you and your friend plan to visit this weekend will be closed. Contact your friend, explain the situation, and suggest two or three alternatives to the issue.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I just found out the park we wanted to visit this weekend will be closed. I checked online and it said they're doing repairs, so we can't go there like we planned. Honestly, I don't really know what to do now. Can you go to a different park nearby instead? If that's not good, maybe we could go to a cafe or watch a movie together. Or, if you want, we can just wait and visit the park another weekend when it opens again. Do you have any better idea? Thanks for understanding.

topic: 공원 가는 길에 친구를 못 데리러 감
question: There is a problem I need you to act it out. You had planned to pick up your friend on the way to the park, but now you're unable to do so because of an unexpected issue. Contact your friend, explain the situation, and suggest two or three alternatives.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to pick you up on the way to the park, but something unexpected happened. This morning, my car wouldn't start at all, so I couldn't leave my place to get you like we planned. Honestly, I'm kind of stuck and I don't really know what to do. Can you maybe take the bus or grab a taxi so we can meet at the park entrance instead? If that's not possible, I could try to get my car fixed quickly and then come pick you up, but it might take a while. Or if today just isn't working out, do you want to reschedule and go to the park together tomorrow? Do you have any other idea that might work better? Thanks so much for understanding.

question: You already have plans for the evening of the party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and offer two or three alternatives regarding the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I just checked my calendar, and I realized I already had plans for the evening of your party. I completely forgot about it until now, and both things are at the same time. Honestly, I feel really bad because I was looking forward to your party. I don't really know what to do. Can we maybe meet up on a different day instead? If that's not possible, is it okay if I stop by your party later, after my other plans are finished? Or, we could hang out together next weekend if that works better for you. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You are supposed to help your friend prepare for the party. However, you have a problem and cannot go to the party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and give two to three alternatives regarding the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to help you get ready for the party, but my boss just told me I have to stay late at work. I only found out a little while ago, so I couldn't give you a heads up before. Honestly, I'm kind of panicking because I really wanted to help you, and now I don't really know what to do. So, can I maybe send my brother to help you set up? He's got some free time tonight. If that's not good, can I come over right now and help with what I can before I go to work? Or, if those don't work, I can show up early next time and help with everything then. Do you have any better ideas? Thanks so much for understanding.

question: You just had a car accident and you think you are going to be late for the holiday party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and give two to three alternatives regarding the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was driving to the party earlier, but I got into a small car accident. Luckily, nobody was hurt, but my car got pretty banged up, and I had to stop and wait for the police and the insurance company to show up. Because of all this, I think I'm going to be really late for the party tonight. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. I'm still kind of shaken up. So, can you guys go ahead and start the party without me? If that's not okay, is it possible for me to take a taxi and come after I finish everything here? Or, if it's already too late by then, maybe we can just meet up and celebrate another day. Do you have any better idea? Thank you for your understanding.

question: After you agreed to help plan the party with your friend, you realize that you will be very busy the week before the party. Call him, explain the situation and offer two or three suggestions on how to plan the party in less time.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I promised to help you plan the party, but honestly, my week got super busy. I just found out that I have a big project at work, so I haven't had any free time to get things ready for the party. I really want to help, but I'm not sure what to do right now. Do you think we could make things easier this time? Maybe we can just order food instead of cooking everything ourselves. Or, if that's not possible, can I take care of just the music and invitations, and you handle the food? If both of us are still too busy, maybe we could ask a couple of friends to help us out with the planning. Do you have any better ideas? Thank you for your understanding.

question: On the day of the performance, you are sick. Call your friend and explain the situation and offer two different options for resolving the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. Actually, I got really sick today. I woke up this morning with a high fever, almost 39 degrees, and I feel super weak now. I was really excited about the performance tonight, but I just can't go. I don't really know what to do. Honestly, I'm kind of worried about ruining our plans. So, can you maybe go with someone else instead, like Peter? If that's not possible, is it okay if I give you my ticket so you can invite anyone you want? Or, if you'd rather wait, we could plan to see another show together once I feel better. Do you have any better idea? Thank you so much for understanding. I hope you have a great time if you go, and let's talk soon.

question: Your friend tries to send a document to your smartphone. You attempt to open the document, but you cannot read it. Contact your friend, explain the situation, and offer two or three possible solutions to the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I got the document you sent to my phone, but when I tried to open it, I couldn't read anything. The file just wouldn't load, and my phone said it can't open this type of file. Honestly, I'm not sure what to do right now. Can you save the document as a PDF and send it to me again? My phone usually opens PDFs with no problem. If that's hard, can you email the file to me instead? I think I can open it on my laptop. Or, if it's easier, could you take a screenshot of the document and text me the picture? Do you have any other ideas that might work better? Thank you for your understanding.

question: Before you leave on a trip overseas with the friend, you learn that your phone service plan is set up for international calls, but your friend's phone is not. Talk to your friend and offer two or three solutions to resolve this problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I checked our phone plans before our trip, and I found out that my plan is already set up for international calls, but yours isn't. That means when we get overseas, your phone probably won't work for calls or texts. I just realized this now, so I wanted to talk to you right away. Honestly, I don't really know what to do about it right now. Can you call your phone company and ask them to add the international plan before we leave? If that's not possible, maybe you can get a local SIM card when we arrive. Or, if you want, we can just use my phone together while we're traveling. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you get the new phone, you realized that it does not have all the features you need. Call the store, explain what is missing, and make arrangements to get a phone that has what you need.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I bought a new phone from your store yesterday, but after I set it up at home, I realized it doesn't have some of the features I really need. Honestly, I was surprised when I saw that the storage space is way smaller than I thought, and the camera quality is not good enough for my daily use. I don't really know what to do. Can you help me exchange this phone for a model that has more storage and a better camera? If that's not possible, is it okay for me to get a full refund? Or maybe I can come to the store and talk to someone in person to figure this out? Do you have any better option you can offer? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you get to your new home, you discover that a window is broken. Call the repair shop and leave a message. Describe in detail the condition of the window. Explain how you think the window got broken. Give two or three reasons why it is important that the window is fixed today.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  I just moved into my new home, and when I got here, I saw that one of the windows was broken. There’s a big crack running across the middle of the glass, and a small piece is missing from the bottom corner. Honestly, I think it might have happened during the move, or maybe something heavy hit it from outside.  I'm not really sure what to do right now.  It’s pretty cold, and the wind keeps coming in through the gap. Also, I’m worried because it’s not very safe—someone could easily reach inside. Can you send someone to replace the window today? If that’s not possible, could you at least send someone to cover it up for now, so it’s safer? Or maybe you have another quick solution?  Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: A person from abroad has recently rented an apartment in your building. It seems that he is not familiar with recycling policies and has been throwing away garbage in the recycling bin. The other residents are upset. Speak to the new person, explain the recycling rules and offer some suggestions to prevent this from happening in the future.
answer: Hi, I’m your neighbor from the same building. I’m calling because there’s a bit of a problem.  Some of the other residents noticed that regular trash was put in the recycling bins, and honestly, people got pretty upset about it. I think maybe you didn’t get a chance to learn about our recycling rules yet. In our building, we always separate paper, plastic, and cans into different bins, and food waste goes in the green bin. The labels on the bins are pretty simple, but I know it can be confusing at first.  I don’t really know what to do right now, but I want to help.  Can you try to check the bin labels before throwing things away from now on? If that’s hard, can I come by and show you how to sort the trash this week? Or maybe I could print out a simple guide in your language to make it easier.  Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You often host large parties and take out most of the recycling and garbage the next day. However, other residents in your building are not happy about it, and one of them has come to complain to you. Explain the situation and offer some suggestions to resolve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. Some of my neighbors are upset about the way I handle the trash after my parties. Last weekend, I hosted a pretty big party, and there was a lot of recycling and garbage. I put all the bags in the hallway and planned to take them out the next morning, but I guess it bothered other people overnight. Honestly, I don't really know what to do. Can you let me know if it's okay for me to take the garbage out right after the party, even if it's late? If not, is it possible for me to keep the bags inside my apartment until the morning so they don't get in anyone's way? Or maybe I could use a different exit to take out the trash so it's less noticeable. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you arrive at your relative's house, the door is locked and the key is not where it is supposed to be. Call your relative's hotel and leave a message explaining the situation. Give two or three options to resolve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I just got to your house, but the front door was locked and the key wasn't in the usual place. I checked under the mat and around the flower pots, just like you told me before, but honestly, I couldn't find it anywhere. Now I'm kind of stuck outside and I don't really know what to do. Can you let me know if there's another place where you might have left the key? If that's not possible, is there a neighbor who has a spare key that I could borrow? Or if neither of those work, I can wait at a nearby cafe until you get back or call me. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: I am not sure if I can let you rent a car because I am not familiar with your non-US driver's license. Can you explain to me what the license says and why it is the same as a valid US license?
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  I wanted to rent a car today, but you said you weren't sure about my non-US driver's license.  Honestly, I'm not really sure what to do.  My license is from my home country, and it looks a little different, but it has my full name, photo, date of birth, license number, and expiration date, just like a US license. It also says I'm allowed to drive a regular car, which is the same as a standard US license. I've used it for years and never had any issues.  Can you accept my license if I also show you my passport, so you can check my name and photo? If that's not possible, can I show you my international driving permit as well? Or is there another way I can prove my license is valid?  Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You want to rent a specific kind of car, but you find out that NONE are available. Call the manager and describe the situation. Explain why you want that particular kind of car and offer several alternatives to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I booked an SUV with you for my trip, but when I arrived, I found out that none are available right now. Honestly, I really needed an SUV because I'm traveling with my whole family and we have a lot of luggage, so a smaller car just isn't big enough for us. I'm not really sure what to do at this point. Can you offer me a similar large vehicle, like a van or maybe a minivan, instead? If that's not possible, could you let me know if an SUV might come back later today so I could wait for it? Or, is it possible for you to check with another branch nearby to see if they have an SUV I could use? Do you have any better option you can suggest? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you get to the store, you realize that you left your wallet at the restaurant. Call the restaurant, explain what happened, and suggest an arrangement for the wallet to be returned to you.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  I ate lunch at your restaurant about an hour ago, and I just realized I left my wallet there. It's a small brown leather wallet, and I think it slipped out of my bag and maybe fell under the table where I was sitting.  Honestly, I'm not sure what to do right now.  Can you please check my table and see if my wallet is still there? If you find it, is it possible for you to keep it safe at the front desk until I come back? I can return in about thirty minutes to pick it up. Or, if that's not easy, could I send a friend to pick it up for me instead? If you need to reach me, you can call or text this number.  Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: On your way to the restaurant, you were delayed by an accident on the road. Call your friend's cell phone and leave a voice mail. Explain the situation and offer two or three alternatives.
answer: Hey, it's me. I'm calling because I have a problem. On my way to the restaurant, there was an accident on the road, and traffic got really bad. Cars were barely moving, and everything was totally backed up, so I got stuck and now I'm going to be late, maybe around twenty or thirty minutes. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you go inside and get our table first, so we don't lose it? Or, is it possible for you to order something for both of us, so we don't have to wait when I get there? If you don’t want to wait alone, maybe you can hang out at a cafe nearby and I’ll let you know when I’m close. Do you have any better idea? Thanks for understanding. See you soon.

question: You just had a great meal at the new restaurant, but after your meal, you found out that you left your money and wallet at home. Explain your situation to the staff and make suggestions to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I just finished eating at your restaurant, and honestly, the meal was really great. But when I went to pay, I realized I left my wallet and all my money at home. I don't have any cash or cards with me, and I'm kind of embarrassed right now. I don't really know what to do. Can I pay using my phone, like with a payment app? If that's not possible, is it okay if I go home quickly and come back with my wallet? Or maybe I can leave my ID here while I go get the money? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You ordered food to be delivered to your workplace for a lunch meeting. When you opened the package, you realize that the delivery person has brought someone else's order. Call the restaurant, talk to the manager and offer two or three solutions to the problem, so that you can get the correct order as soon as possible.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I ordered lunch for a meeting at my office, but when the food arrived and I opened the package, it turned out to be someone else's order. Honestly, it's not what I ordered at all, and our meeting is about to start soon, so this is pretty stressful. I don't really know what to do. Can you send the correct order to my office as soon as possible? If that's not possible, can someone come by and swap the meals, since I still have the wrong food here? Or, if neither of those work, is it possible to get a refund for this order? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You went to the sale and bought several items, but when you returned home, you are surprised to discover that one item is missing. Call the store and leave a message explaining your problem with as much detail as possible. Suggest several solutions to the situation.
answer: Hi, I’m calling because I have a problem. I went to your sale earlier today and bought a few things, but when I got home and opened my bag, I realized one item was missing. It was a blue sweater, and I’m sure I paid for it because it’s on my receipt. I think maybe it got left at the counter or in the bagging area by mistake. Honestly, I’m not really sure what to do right now. Could you check if the sweater is still there on your end? If you find it, can you hold it for me so I can come pick it up soon? Or, if it’s possible, could you send it to my address instead? I can send you a picture of my receipt if you need it. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: You left your wallet behind at the store. Call the store and explain your situation. Give several alternatives to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I was at your store about thirty minutes ago, and I just realized I left my wallet there. I remember putting it down on the counter when I paid, and I must have forgotten to pick it up before I left. It's a black wallet with a zipper, and it has all my cards inside. Honestly, I'm pretty worried and I don't really know what to do right now. Could you please check the counter and maybe the lost-and-found area to see if someone turned it in? If you find it, is it possible for you to keep it safe at the register until I get there? Or, if I can't come today, can you hold onto it until tomorrow? If there's any other way to handle this, please let me know. Thank you so much for your understanding.

question: Once you get home with the things you bought, you realize that you did not get them at the sale price. Call the store and explain the situation and offer several ways to resolve the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I bought some things at your store today, and when I got home, I checked my receipt. I realized I was charged the regular price instead of the sale price, even though the items were clearly marked as on sale. Honestly, I'm not sure what I should do now. Can you refund the difference back to my card? If that's not possible, is it okay if I visit the store with my receipt and get the refund in person? Or, if neither of those work, could you maybe give me a store credit or coupon for the difference? Do you have any better way to fix this? Thank you so much for your help.

question: Once you get home with an item you bought, you realize that the item is damaged. Call the store and explain the situation and state what you want to do to resolve the situation.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I bought something from your store earlier today, and when I got home and opened the box, I saw that it was damaged. There’s a big crack on the side and part of it looks chipped, so I couldn’t use it at all. I honestly didn’t see any damage when I was at the store, so I was pretty surprised. I don’t really know what to do right now. Can you change it for a new one that’s not damaged? If you don’t have another one in stock, is it possible to get a full refund instead? Or, if both are difficult, can I return it by mail and will you cover the shipping cost? I have the receipt and the original box with me. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: Your friend offers to meet you, so that you can learn more about the industry which she works in. However, a few days before meeting your friend, a member of your family has an emergency and need to help him. Call your friend, explain the situation and offer two or three alternatives, so that you can get the information later on.

One of my family members had an emergency, and I had to help him out. It was really sudden, and I just couldn't leave him alone. I'm not really sure what to do now. Can we move our meeting to next week, if that's okay for you? Or, if you're busy, maybe we could do a short video call instead, whenever you have some free time? If that's still too hard, could you send me some notes or information by message? Do you have any better idea? Thank you so much for understanding.

question: When you get to the train station, you miss your train and will be late to meet your friend. Call your friend, explain your situation and offer some alternatives.
answer: Hey, it's me. I'm calling because I have a problem. I just got to the train station, but I missed my train by about two minutes. There were a lot of people at the gate, and I just couldn't get through in time, so my train left without me. Honestly, I don't really know what to do right now. Can you wait for me at a cafe near the station until I arrive? If that's not okay, is it possible for us to meet a bit later today instead? Or, if your schedule is too busy, maybe we can meet tomorrow instead. Do you have any better idea? Thanks for understanding. I'll let you know as soon as I get on the next train.

question: You have booked a non-refundable plane ticket. However, something has happened that prevents you from going next week. Call the travel agent, explain what has happened, and offer some alternatives to resolve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I booked a non-refundable plane ticket with you for next week, but something unexpected happened and now I can't go as planned. Honestly, I'm not really sure what to do in this situation. I still want to take the trip, just not next week. Can you help me change the ticket to a later date, even if there's a fee? If that's not possible, is there any way I can get a travel credit for future use? Or maybe, can I transfer the ticket to someone else, like a friend or family member? Do you have any better option that might work? Thank you so much for your understanding.

question: The travel agent informs you that the vacation you want is not available for the dates you want. Call your friend, leave a message explaining the situation and offer two or three alternatives.
answer: Hey, it's me. I'm calling because I have a problem with our trip. I spoke with the travel agent today, and the vacation we wanted isn't available for the dates we picked. It turns out that week is already fully booked, which honestly surprised me. I don't really know what to do right now. Can we move our trip to the week after? The agent said those dates are still open. Or, if you want to keep our original dates, we could choose a different destination that's available. If neither works, maybe we can look for something else together. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you have arrived at the airport, you were told that your flight had been cancelled and all other flights were completely booked. Call your travel agency, explain the situation, and make two or three suggestions to deal with the situation. Tell the story from beginning to end.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. I arrived at the airport today, and everything was fine until I tried to check in. The staff told me my flight was cancelled, and when I asked about other flights, they said every single one was already full. So now I'm just sitting here at the airport with my bags, and honestly, I don't really know what to do. Can you check if there's any way to get me on the next available flight, even if it leaves tomorrow? If that's not possible, can you book me a ticket with a different airline? Or, if I have to wait overnight, can you help me find a hotel nearby? Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: The day before your trip, you realize that you will not be able to go. Call your friend and explain why you cannot visit, and make some suggestions as to when you might visit in the future.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem.  Our trip was supposed to be tomorrow, but I just found out I can't go. Yesterday, my boss told me I have to work this weekend, and honestly, I didn't expect it at all. I was really looking forward to seeing you, so I'm pretty upset right now.  I don't really know what to do.  Can we maybe move the trip to next month, when my work is less busy? If that's not possible, is it okay if you go without me this time, and I visit you later? Or, we could try to meet just for a day trip soon, if that's easier.  Do you have any better idea? Thank you for understanding. I hope we can figure something out.

question: Your friend wants you to come over and see his pictures from his trip this evening. However, you have another engagement. Call your friend, explain why you cannot come by this evening and offer some alternatives.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. You invited me over tonight to see your trip pictures, but honestly, I just realized I already promised to meet someone else this evening.
