If that's not good, maybe you could send me a few pictures tonight, and we can look at the rest together later. Or, if you want, we could meet for coffee this weekend and you can show me everything then. Do you have any better idea? Thanks so much for understanding.

question: You are going to meet me at the airport, but you have some emergency and can not make it. Call my voice mail and leave a message. Explain the problem and give me two or three options so that I can get from the airport to your home.
answer: Hi, this is me. I'm calling because I have a problem. I was supposed to meet you at the airport today, but honestly, something urgent happened at the last minute, and I just couldn't get there. I'm really sorry about this. I don't really know what to do. Can you take a taxi to my place? It's only about thirty minutes away, and I'll pay you back for the ride. If that's not possible, is it okay for you to take the airport bus? It stops pretty close to my home, and I can send you the directions right away. Or, if you'd rather not travel alone, I can try to ask my friend to pick you up instead. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: Because of the flight delay, you cannot attend a business meeting. Call your client, explain the situation, and offer some alternatives to solve the problem.
answer: Hi, I'm calling because I have a problem. My flight was delayed today, so I couldn't get to the airport on time and now I won't make it to our business meeting. Honestly, I was all packed and waiting at the gate, but they suddenly announced a long delay, and I missed my chance to get there as planned. I don't really know what to do. Can we move our meeting to later this afternoon, after I arrive? If that's not possible, could we reschedule for tomorrow morning instead? Or, if it's easier for you, we could switch to a video call today so we can still talk without waiting. Do you have any better option? Thank you for your understanding.

question: When you try to play the movie, something is wrong and it does not play. Explain the problem to your guests and offer two or three different solutions or alternatives to the problem.
answer: Hey guys, I’m calling because I have a problem.  So, I picked out a movie for us to watch tonight, but when I tried to play it, it just didn’t work. The screen kept buffering for a long time, and then it completely froze. I tried clicking a few times, but nothing happened, so I think the file might be broken or maybe there’s an issue with the internet connection.  Honestly, I don’t really know what to do right now.  Can we try watching a different movie instead? There are a bunch of other options we could choose from. If not, is it okay if I restart the device and see if that helps? Or, if you want, we could play a board game or do something else fun together.  Do you have a better idea? Thanks for understanding.

question: What kinds of things do you usually do when you have an appointment? Tell me what a typical appointment is like for you.
answer: Well, whenever I have an appointment, I usually follow a simple routine to keep things easy.  First, the night before, I double-check the time and place, just to make sure I don’t forget anything.  Actually, on the day itself, I get ready a bit early and leave my house with plenty of time, because I really don’t like being late.  Another thing is, when I arrive at the location, I usually get there a little early and wait quietly until my turn comes.  As for me, after the appointment, I like to stop by a nearby cafe and grab a coffee before heading home.  Overall, this routine makes my appointments feel pretty stress-free and relaxed, so I always feel calm about them.

question: What steps are taken when making an appointment? What things do you need to consider when scheduling an appointment? What sequence do you follow when making an appointment?
answer: Well, when I make an appointment, I usually do it a few times a month, and I always follow a simple routine. First, I check my own calendar to see when I’m available, because I don’t want any overlap with other plans. Actually, another thing is, I think about the location and time, since I want to make sure it’s convenient for everyone involved. After that, I contact the other person, either by calling or sending a message, to suggest a few options and confirm what works best. Finally, I double-check all the details like the date and time, and then I save everything on my phone so I remember. Overall, personally, I really try to keep things easy and organized, because it helps avoid any confusion and makes the whole process smoother.

question: Tell me about the kinds of things you usually do when you go to the bank.
answer: Well, whenever I go to the bank, it's usually just for a simple errand, and I don't spend much time there.  First, I grab a number at the entrance and wait until my turn comes up.  Actually, sometimes there are a lot of people, so I just listen to music while I wait.  Next, I go up to the counter and let the staff know what I need, like transferring money or making a payment.  After that, I double-check that everything is done right, and then I put my card and receipt back in my wallet.  Overall, it always feels pretty quick and organized, so I don't really mind going.  As for me, I like how efficient it is, and it gives me a sense of accomplishment when I'm done.

question: Tell me about the activities you usually do at a dentist office. What do you do there, and why?
answer: Well, a few times a year, I usually visit the dentist for a regular check-up. First, I walk in and check in at the front desk, which only takes a minute or two. For example, after that, I sit in the waiting area and relax until my name gets called. Then, I go into the treatment room, and the dentist checks my teeth and does a simple cleaning. Another thing is,  when the cleaning is done, the dentist explains if I have any issues and gives me some tips for better care. As for me,  I always try to ask a few questions about my dental health, just to be safe. Overall, I go to the dentist mainly to keep my teeth healthy and prevent any big problems. It feels good to know I’m taking care of myself.

question: Tell me about the kinds of things you typically do when you visit friends or family? Do you eat? Talk? Or play together? What are some popular activities when you get together?
answer: Well, whenever I visit my friends or family, I usually just take it easy and enjoy a relaxed time together.  First, we sit down and catch up over some coffee or a nice meal, since talking is honestly the best part.  Actually, we often share a home-cooked meal or sometimes order some takeout, which gives us more time to chat and laugh.  After eating, we usually watch a movie together or play some simple games, like cards or board games.  As for me, I really love these moments because they make me feel close to the people I care about.  Overall, eating, talking, and just spending time together are the most popular things we do, and it always feels comfortable and fun.

question: What do you usually do when you go shopping for new clothes? Where do you go and what do you look for? Tell me about a typical shopping trip for you.
answer: Well, whenever I go shopping for new clothes, I usually visit a big shopping mall close to my house because it has so many different stores. First, I like to walk around and check out a few shops to see what’s new and trendy. Actually, I spend some time looking at the displays and comparing styles, since I want to find something that really fits my taste. Next, I pick out a couple of items that catch my eye and try them on in the fitting room to check the size and how they look on me. After that, I look at the price tags and decide if it’s worth buying or not. Personally, I always look for simple and comfortable clothes that I can wear every day. So yeah, shopping this way feels pretty relaxing and helps me find things I really like.

question: Tell me about the kinds of foods you eat on a regular day. When and where do you usually eat? Do you make your own meals or does someone else make them for you?
answer: Well,  on a regular day, I usually keep my meals pretty simple and easy.  In the morning, I start with a light breakfast at home, like toast and coffee or maybe some fruit.  Actually, I don’t really have time to cook anything big before work.  Around noon, I usually eat lunch outside or just grab something quick near my workplace, like a sandwich or some noodles.  After work, I either cook a simple dinner at home or order delivery if I’m feeling tired.  As for me, I make most of my meals myself because it’s cheaper and a bit healthier that way.  Overall, I feel pretty satisfied with my routine because it fits my lifestyle and keeps things convenient.

question: How do you shop for healthy food? What kinds of things do you have to do to cook healthy food?
answer: Well,  a few times a week, I go grocery shopping to get healthy food for my meals.  First, I usually make a quick list of what I need, which helps me stay focused and avoid buying snacks I don’t need.  For example, when I get to the store, I always pick up lots of fresh fruits, vegetables, and some lean meats like chicken or fish.  Another thing is, when I cook at home, I try to keep things simple—I often grill or steam my food instead of frying it.  Personally, I also pay attention to how much salt or sauce I use, because I want to keep my meals as healthy as possible.  So yeah, this routine helps me eat better and feel good about what I’m putting into my body.

question: Tell me about how you use your furniture on a typical day. What kinds of things do you do with your furniture?
answer: Well, on a typical day, I use my furniture all the time, so it’s a pretty big part of my daily routine. Usually, I start my morning by getting up from my bed, and then I sit at my small desk to check my phone or do a bit of planning for the day. Another thing is, after I finish work, I go straight to my sofa in the living room and relax there for a while, maybe watching TV or just taking it easy. After that, I usually move to the dining table to have dinner, sometimes while I watch a show. Personally, my sofa and my bed are the pieces I use the most because they’re super comfortable and help me unwind. So yeah, my furniture really supports my daily life and makes everything feel more comfortable and cozy.

question: Explain your routine when you go to get a haircut. What steps do you follow from the moment you enter the salon to the moment you leave? Include details about the interaction with the staff, the services you usually receive, and any other relevant details.
answer: Well, about once a month, I go to a hair salon near my house to get a haircut. First, I walk in and check in at the front desk, and the staff greets me with a smile. Actually, they usually ask me to wait for a few minutes, so I just sit down and relax. When it's my turn, I sit in the chair and talk to the stylist about what kind of haircut I want. Another thing is, after discussing the style, the stylist washes my hair and then starts cutting it very carefully. Finally, when the haircut is finished, they sometimes style my hair a bit, and I check the result in the mirror. As for me, I always thank the staff and go to pay at the counter before leaving. So yeah, I feel pretty comfortable there because the staff is really friendly, and the whole process is simple and relaxing.

question: Tell me about all the things you do in order to stay healthy.
answer: Well, to stay healthy, I usually stick to a few easy habits during my week. First, I try to eat fresh, home-cooked meals instead of ordering junk food or having late-night snacks. For example, I make simple dishes with lots of vegetables, which feels lighter. Another thing is, I work out a few times a week, so I often go for a run outside or do some stretching at home. After that, I always try to drink plenty of water and make sure I get enough sleep, since I know rest is really important. Personally, I also like to take a short walk every day, just to clear my mind and get some fresh air. So yeah, it’s nothing special, but these small things help me feel healthy and energetic every day.

question: What are the eating habits of healthy people? What do they usually eat during the week, for breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks, etc?
answer: Well, healthy people usually try to keep their eating habits pretty simple and balanced throughout the week. For breakfast, they often start with something light, like oatmeal, eggs, or some fresh fruit, to get their energy up in the morning. Actually, for lunch, they usually choose a meal with lots of vegetables, some lean meat, and maybe a bit of rice or whole grain bread, instead of going for greasy or heavy foods. Another thing is, for dinner, they keep it light again and avoid eating too late at night, which helps with digestion and sleep. As for snacks, they tend to pick things like nuts, yogurt, or fruit, instead of chips or sweets. Overall, these habits help them feel healthier and more energetic every day, and personally, I think it’s a great way to stay in good shape.

question: Choose one of the holidays you just told me about. Tell me about all the things people typically do to celebrate this holiday. What activities are involved?
answer: Well, on a big holiday like this, people usually follow the same routine every year. First, most people travel to their hometowns to see their family, even if the traffic is pretty bad. Then, everyone gathers at someone’s house and shares a huge meal with lots of traditional dishes. Actually, preparing the food together is a big part of the day, and it brings everyone closer. After eating, families often sit around and chat, play simple games, or just relax while the kids run around and have fun. Another thing is, some people visit relatives who live nearby, or sometimes they just take a nap at home. Overall, the main point of the holiday is spending quality time with family, and as for me, I always feel happy and relaxed when I’m with them. So yeah, that’s what people typically do to celebrate this holiday.

question: What kinds of tasks do doctors usually perform? Describe the typical responsibilities and roles doctors have in hospitals.
answer: Well, in hospitals, doctors usually have a pretty busy routine every day. Most of the time, they check on their patients first thing in the morning to see how everyone is feeling. Actually, another thing is, they meet new patients and listen carefully to their problems so they can figure out what’s wrong. After that, doctors often order some tests or start treatment, and then they make sure to explain everything clearly to the patient. Finally, they write down notes about each case and work together with nurses to give the best care. Overall, their main responsibility is to help people stay healthy and recover from sickness, and honestly, I think that’s a really important role in our society.

question: Tell me what you typically do when you go to a hotel. What do you do first, second, et cetera? When do you usually stay at hotels?
answer: Well,  a few times a year, I usually stay at hotels when I go on a trip or just want a short break from daily life.  First, I head to the front desk to check in, get my room key, and then make my way up to my room.  Actually, once I get inside, I always drop off my bags and take a moment to look around and see what the room is like.  Another thing is, I like to freshen up a bit—maybe wash my face or change clothes—and then I usually relax on the bed or check out the view from the window.  Overall, staying at a hotel feels really comfortable and gives me a nice change of scenery.  Personally, I enjoy this routine because it helps me unwind and makes my trip feel special every time.

question: What do people usually do to prepare for their future careers? How do they learn about the different types of industries and how do they get ready to apply for those jobs?
answer: Well, when people get ready for their future careers, they usually follow a few simple steps. First, they choose a field that really interests them, so they have a clear direction. Actually, another thing is, they spend time researching different industries online or by talking to people who work in those areas, just to understand what each job involves. After that, they try to build up their skills—maybe by taking classes, doing internships, or joining clubs related to their field. And then, when they feel more confident, they update their resume and start practicing for job interviews. Personally, I think this process helps people feel a lot more prepared and less nervous about their future. So yeah, most people just try to learn as much as they can and get some real experience before they start applying for jobs.

question: Tell me about what you do when you surf the internet. What kinds of sites do you usually visit? Do you usually share videos, do your shopping, read the news, etc? What kinds of information are you usually looking for?
answer: Well, I surf the internet almost every day, and I usually follow a pretty similar routine each time. question: Tell me about your typical routine when you get online at work. What about in your free time? Tell me about your online activities.

question: Tell me about the activities you usually do at a pharmacy. What do you do there, and why?
answer: Well, whenever I visit a pharmacy, it's usually because I need something for my health. Overall, I feel pretty relieved because I know I can get the right advice and products quickly. Personally, I really appreciate how helpful the pharmacists are, so I trust going there whenever I have a health problem.

question: What kinds of things do you and your friends usually do on your phones besides talking to each other over the phone? Do you update social media pages? Do you play games? What do you usually do with your phone?
answer: Well, my friends and I actually use our phones for all sorts of things besides just calling each other. Almost every day, we check social media together. Another thing is, we send lots of funny videos and chat in our group messages all day long. Sometimes, we even play mobile games together or watch short videos when we have some free time. As for me, I also use my phone a lot for online shopping or searching for information when I need it. So yeah, our phones are pretty much a big part of our daily routine, and honestly, it just feels really convenient and fun to do all these things with my friends.

question: I'd like to know about your routine of talking on the phone. Who do you talk with, when do you usually talk on the phone and how long do you talk for? Do you do other things at the same time when you are on the phone?
answer: Well, I usually talk on the phone with my family or a couple of close friends, and this happens a few times a week. First, I tend to make my calls in the evening, after I get home from work and have some free time. Actually, I often start by asking how their day went or sharing something funny that happened to me. Another thing is, while I’m chatting, I usually do other things at the same time, like cooking dinner or cleaning up my room. As for me, I prefer to keep my phone calls pretty short, maybe around ten or fifteen minutes, because I like to relax and not spend too much time on the phone. So yeah, my routine is simple and casual, but it always helps me feel connected to the people I care about.

question: What activities did you do to get your current job? How did you prepare for it, what steps did you take before you got hired, and what influenced your decision or preparation the most? Please describe everything in detail.
answer: Well, whenever I try to get a new job, I usually follow a routine that helps me prepare step by step. First, I spend some time researching companies online to find the ones that really fit what I want. For example, I look at their websites and read about their values or work culture.
